label_basis: Reviewed labels for the verified 20-model ONNX corpus by target profile contract. Unsupported ops and dtypes are the expected deployment-gate findings for each model/profile cell.

labels.notes: Reviewed label: strict MCU profile rejects this verified corpus model by deployment-budget, dtype, shape, quantization, or operator constraints.
Reviewed label: ORT mobile-like seed profile accepts this verified corpus model under the calibrated 20-model operator and memory boundary.
Reviewed label: generic TFLM-like profile rejects this verified corpus model by int8/static-shape MCU constraints.
